          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Parent Companies and Branches"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "This document describes how **Parent Companies**, **Subsidiaries**, and **Branches** are modeled and managed in the Invoice Portal."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "## 1. Overview"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "The system uses a **hierarchical company structure** with three types:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "| Type   | Label       | Role in hierarchy |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "|--------|-------------|--------------------|"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "| **CORP**  | Corporate   | Top-level (parent only). Cannot have a parent. |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "| **SUB**   | Subsidiary  | Mid-level. Must have a parent (CORP or another SUB). Can have children (SUB or BRANCH). |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "| **BRANCH**| Branch      | Leaf-level. Must have a parent (CORP or SUB). Typically has no children. |"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- **Parent company** = any company that can have children: **CORP** or **SUB**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "- **Branches** and **Subsidiaries** always belong to exactly one parent via &#96;parentId&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "- The hierarchy is stored with a **parent reference** (&#96;parentId&#96;) and optional **nested set** indexes (&#96;left&#96;, &#96;right&#96;) for efficient tree queries."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "## 2. Data Model"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "### 2.1 Company table (relevant fields)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "- **&#96;parentId&#96;** (UUID, nullable) – Parent company. &#96;null&#96; for CORP; required for SUB and BRANCH."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "- **&#96;left&#96;** / **&#96;right&#96;** (integer, nullable) – Nested set boundaries; updated in the background when the tree changes."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "- **&#96;type&#96;** – &#96;'CORP'&#96; | &#96;'SUB'&#96; | &#96;'BRANCH'&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "- **&#96;name&#96;**, **&#96;referenceNo&#96;**, **&#96;code&#96;**, **&#96;email&#96;**, address, contacts, etc. – standard company attributes."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "### 2.2 Associations (Sequelize)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "- **Parent/children**: &#96;Company&#96; has many &#96;Company&#96; via &#96;parentId&#96; (&#96;children&#96;); each company belongs to one &#96;Company&#96; (&#96;parent&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "- **On delete**: &#96;onDelete: 'SET NULL'&#96; on the parent association — if a parent is removed, children’s &#96;parentId&#96; is set to &#96;null&#96; (but business rules prevent deleting a company that still has children)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "## 3. Business Rules"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "### 3.1 Creating companies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "- **CORP**: &#96;parentId&#96; must be &#96;null&#96;. No parent selection."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "- **SUB** and **BRANCH**: &#96;parentId&#96; is **required**. Parent must be an existing company with type CORP or SUB."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "- **Type** must be one of: &#96;CORP&#96;, &#96;SUB&#96;, &#96;BRANCH&#96;."
          }

      "codeBlock": {

          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "- **Parent Company** is required; search/pagination via **&#96;GET /api/companies/parents&#96;**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "- Submits to **&#96;POST /api/companies&#96;** with &#96;type: 'BRANCH'&#96; and chosen &#96;parentId&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "### 5.4 Add Subsidiary page (&#96;/companies/add-subsidiary&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "- Same idea as Add Branch but for **SUB**."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "- Parent must be CORP or SUB; submits with &#96;type: 'SUB'&#96; and &#96;parentId&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "### 5.5 Hierarchy filter"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "- **&#96;HierarchicalCompanyFilter&#96;** (e.g. for documents/reports) uses **&#96;GET /api/companies/hierarchy&#96;** to show a tree of companies the user can access (CORP → SUB → BRANCH)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "## 6. Nested Set (technical)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "- **Purpose**: Fast “all descendants” and tree queries without recursive SQL."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "- **Storage**: &#96;companies.left&#96; and &#96;companies.right&#96; (integers)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "- **Update**: Handled in &#96;backend/utils/nestedSet.js&#96;.  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "  - &#96;updateNestedSetIndexes(Company)&#96; recomputes all &#96;left&#96;/&#96;right&#96; from &#96;parentId&#96;.  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "  - &#96;queueNestedSetUpdate()&#96; enqueues this job (or runs it synchronously if no queue)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "- **When**: Called after company create, update (that changes hierarchy), and delete."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "## 7. Summary"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "- **Parent companies** = CORP and SUB; they appear in parent dropdowns and can have SUB/BRANCH children."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "- **Branches** = type BRANCH; each has exactly one parent (CORP or SUB), created via Companies page, Branches page, or Add Branch."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "- **Subsidiaries** = type SUB; each has one parent (CORP or SUB), can themselves be parents; created via Companies page or Add Subsidiary."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "- **Rules**: CORP has no parent; SUB/BRANCH require a valid parent; no self-parent; no deleting a company that has children."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "- **APIs**: &#96;/parents&#96; for parent selection, &#96;/hierarchy&#96; for tree, &#96;/:id/hierarchy&#96; for descendants, &#96;/:id/relationships&#96; for full relationship tree."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "- **UI**: Companies (all types + parent selector), Branches (BRANCH only), Add Branch, Add Subsidiary, and hierarchical filter all use the above APIs and rules."
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 160
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 127
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\Parent-Companies-and-Branches.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.5767017602920532

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "### 4.3 Hierarchy (tree)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "- **&#96;GET /api/companies/hierarchy&#96;**  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "  - Returns companies the user can access, structured as a **tree** (nested &#96;children&#96;).  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "  - Respects document-access permissions (&#96;req.accessibleCompanyIds&#96;).  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "  - Optional: &#96;search&#96;, &#96;page&#96;, &#96;limit&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "- **&#96;GET /api/companies/:id/hierarchy&#96;**  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "  - Returns **all descendants** of the given company (by id).  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "  - Uses nested set (&#96;left&#96;/&#96;right&#96;) when present, otherwise recursive load by &#96;parentId&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "### 4.4 Relationships (ancestors + descendants)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "- **&#96;GET /api/companies/:id/relationships&#96;**  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "  - Returns the company plus its **parent chain** (ancestors) and **descendants** in a nested structure.  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "  - Useful for “everything related to this company” views."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "### 4.5 Create / update"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "- **&#96;POST /api/companies&#96;**  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "  - Body must include &#96;name&#96;, &#96;referenceNo&#96;, and for SUB/BRANCH a valid &#96;parentId&#96;.  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "  - Validates type and parent rules; then queues nested set update."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "- **&#96;PUT /api/companies/:id&#96;**  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "  - Same parent/type rules; allows changing &#96;parentId&#96; (e.g. moving a branch to another parent).  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "  - Queues nested set update when hierarchy changes."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "## 5. Frontend Usage"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "### 5.1 Companies page (&#96;/companies&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "- Lists all company types with filters: **Corporate**, **Subsidiary**, **Branch** (and search, status, parent filters)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "- Create/edit modal: when type is **SUB** or **BRANCH**, a **Parent Company** selector is shown (searchable; loads from &#96;GET /api/companies/parents&#96; or equivalent)."
          },
          {

            "text": "- Displays parent and type (e.g. badges for CORP / SUB / BRANCH)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "### 5.2 Branches page (&#96;/branches&#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {

            "text": "- Lists only companies with **&#96;type === 'BRANCH'&#96;** (via &#96;GET /api/companies?type=BRANCH&#96;)."
          },

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 125,

          },
          {

          },

          }
        ],

            "text": "### 3.2 Updating companies"

          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "- Same rules as create: CORP cannot have a parent; SUB/BRANCH must have a valid parent."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "- A company **cannot be its own parent** (&#96;parentId !== company.id&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "- Parent must exist and be CORP or SUB."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "### 3.3 Deleting companies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "- A company **cannot be deleted if it has any children** (other companies with &#96;parentId&#96; equal to its id)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "- Message: *\"Cannot delete company with children. Please delete or reassign children first.\"*"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "- Delete children (or reassign their &#96;parentId&#96;) before deleting the parent."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "### 3.4 Nested set"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "- After create, update (when &#96;parentId&#96; or structure changes), or delete, a **nested set update** is queued (or run synchronously if no queue)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "- This refreshes &#96;left&#96; and &#96;right&#96; for all companies so hierarchy queries (e.g. “all descendants”) remain correct."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "## 4. API Reference"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "### 4.1 Parent companies (for dropdowns / selection)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "- **&#96;GET /api/companies/parents&#96;**  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  - Returns **paginated** list of companies that can be parents: &#96;type IN ('CORP', 'SUB')&#96; and &#96;isActive: true&#96;.  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  - Query: &#96;page&#96;, &#96;limit&#96;, &#96;search&#96; (name, code, referenceNo).  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "  - Used when creating or editing a Branch or Subsidiary to choose the parent."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "### 4.2 Full company list (with parent/children)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "- **&#96;GET /api/companies&#96;**  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "  - Optional query: &#96;type&#96; (e.g. &#96;BRANCH&#96;) or &#96;types&#96; (comma-separated: &#96;CORP,SUB,BRANCH&#96;).  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "  - Response includes &#96;parent&#96; and &#96;children&#96; (light attributes).  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "  - Used by Companies page and by Branches page when filtering &#96;type === 'BRANCH'&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "### 4.3 Hierarchy (tree)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "- **&#96;GET /api/companies/hierarchy&#96;**  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "  - Returns companies the user can access, structured as a **tree** (nested &#96;children&#96;).  "
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 85
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 43
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\docs\\Parent-Companies-and-Branches.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.5101165771484375
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "// Company hierarchy (Parent/Child)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "Company.hasMany(Company, { "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "  foreignKey: 'parentId', "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "  as: 'children',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  onDelete: 'SET NULL'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "});"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "Company.belongsTo(Company, { "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "  foreignKey: 'parentId', "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "  as: 'parent',"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 76
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 72,
            "line": 64
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\backend\\models\\index.js",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.5016523003578186
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {

          {

            "text": "async (req, res) =\u003e {"

          },
          {

            "text": "    "
          },
          {

            "text": "    // SUB and BRANCH companies must have a parent"

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },

        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": " * Company Hierarchy Utilities"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": " * Handles recursive company hierarchy queries for document access control"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": " * "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": " * IMPORTANT: Documents are assigned to companies using account number (referenceNo)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": " * during import/parsing. The invoice.companyId links to the company."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "const { Company } = require('../models');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "const { Op } = require('sequelize').Sequelize;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": " * Get all descendant company IDs for a given company (recursive)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": " * Uses nested set indexes if available for efficiency, otherwise falls back to recursive query"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": " * "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": " * @param {string} companyId - UUID of the company"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": " * @param {boolean} includeSelf - Whether to include the company itself in results"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": " * @returns {Promise\u003cstring[]\u003e} Array of company IDs (descendants)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "async function getDescendantCompanyIds(companyId, includeSelf = false) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "  const company = await Company.findByPk(companyId, {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    attributes: ['id', 'left', 'right']"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "  });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "  if (!company) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    return [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  const descendantIds = [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  // If company has nested set indexes, use them for efficient query"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "  if (company.left !== null \u0026\u0026 company.right !== null) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    const whereCondition = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "      left: { [Op.gte]: company.left },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "      right: { [Op.lte]: company.right }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    if (!includeSelf) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "      whereCondition.id = { [Op.ne]: company.id };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "    const descendants = await Company.findAll({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "      where: whereCondition,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "      attributes: ['id']"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    return descendants.map(d =\u003e d.id);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "  // Fallback: recursive query if nested set not initialized"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 81
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\backend\\utils\\companyHierarchy.js",
        "signatures": {}
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "// Get companies in hierarchical structure for tree view filters"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "// Only returns companies the user has access to, structured as a tree"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "router.get('/hierarchy', auth, checkDocumentAccess, async (req, res) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "  try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "    const { search, page, limit } = req.query;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "    const pageNum = page ? parseInt(page) : 1;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "    const limitNum = limit ? parseInt(limit) : 50; // Default 50 per page"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "    // Build where clause based on user permissions"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "    const where = {};"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    if (req.accessibleCompanyIds !== null) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "      if (req.accessibleCompanyIds.length === 0) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "        return res.json({ "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "          companies: [],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "          pagination: {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "            page: pageNum,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "            limit: limitNum,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "            total: 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "            pages: 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "          }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "        });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "      where.id = { [Op.in]: req.accessibleCompanyIds };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "    // Add search filter if provided"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "    if (search) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "      const searchConditions = ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "        { name: { [Op.iLike]: &#96;%${search}%&#96; } },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "        { code: { [Op.iLike]: &#96;%${search}%&#96; } }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "      ];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "      const searchNum = parseInt(search);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "      if (!isNaN(searchNum)) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "        searchConditions.push({ referenceNo: searchNum });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "      searchConditions.push("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "        Sequelize.where("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "          Sequelize.cast(Sequelize.col('Company.referenceNo'), 'TEXT'),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "          { [Op.iLike]: &#96;%${search}%&#96; }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "      );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "      where[Op.or] = searchConditions;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "    // Fetch all accessible companies (we need all to build the tree)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "    // Sort by referenceNo numerically when searching, otherwise by name"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "    const companies = await Company.findAll({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "      where,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "      attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo', 'code', 'type', 'parentId', 'isActive'],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "      order: search ? [['referenceNo', 'ASC'], ['name', 'ASC']] : [['name', 'ASC']]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "    // Build hierarchical structure"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "    const companyMap = new Map();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "    const rootCompanies = [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "    // First pass: create map of all companies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "    companies.forEach"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 316
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 3,
            "line": 193
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\backend\\routes\\companies.js",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.4626617431640625
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1177,
            "text": "// Get company hierarchy (all descendants)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1178,
            "text": "router.get('/:id/hierarchy', auth, async (req, res) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1179,
            "text": "  try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1180,
            "text": "    const company = await Company.findByPk(req.params.id);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1181,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 1218,
            "text": "// Get all related companies (ancestors and descendants) in nested structure"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1219,
            "text": "router.get('/:id/relationships', auth, async (req, res) =\u003e {"

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1235,
            "text": "    let currentParent = company.parent;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1236,
            "text": "    while (currentParent) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1237,
            "text": "      const parentWithParent = await Company.findByPk(currentParent.id, {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1238,

          {

            "text": "    // Get all descendants (children recursively)"

            "text": "    const getChildrenRecursive = async (parentId, level = 0) =\u003e {"

            "text": "      const children = await Company.findAll({"

          {

          },
          {

            "text": "        const childWithChildren = {"

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": " * Get accessible company IDs for a user based on their assigned companies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": " * Rules:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": " * - If company has children: user sees own company + all descendants"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": " * - If company has no children (branch): user sees only own company"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": " * "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": " * @param {string[]} assignedCompanyIds - Array of company IDs the user is assigned to"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": " * @returns {Promise\u003cstring[]\u003e} Array of all accessible company IDs"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "async function getAccessibleCompanyIds(assignedCompanyIds) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "  if (!assignedCompanyIds || assignedCompanyIds.length === 0) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "    return [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "  const accessibleIds = new Set();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "  for (const companyId of assignedCompanyIds) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "    // Always include the assigned company itself"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "    accessibleIds.add(companyId);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "    // Check if this company has children"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "    const hasDescendants = await hasChildren(companyId);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "    if (hasDescendants) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "      // Company has children - get all descendants"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "      const descendants = await getDescendantCompanyIds(companyId, false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "      descendants.forEach(id =\u003e accessibleIds.add(id));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "    // If no children, it's a branch - only see own (already added above)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "  return Array.from(accessibleIds);"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "module.exports = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "  getDescendantCompanyIds,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "  hasChildren,"
          }
        ],

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": " * Company Hierarchy Filter Component"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": " * Displays companies in a hierarchical structure (Grandparent \u003e Parent \u003e Child)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": " * with multi-select checkboxes and search functionality"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "const CompanyHierarchyFilter = ({ companies, selectedCompanyIds, onSelectionChange }) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "  // Build hierarchical structure"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  const hierarchy = useMemo(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    if (!companies || companies.length === 0) return [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    // Find top-level companies (CORP type or no parent)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    const topLevel = companies.filter(c =\u003e c.type === 'CORP' || !c.parentId);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    // Build tree structure"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    const buildTree = (parentId) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "      return companies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        .filter(c =\u003e c.parentId === parentId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        .map(company =\u003e ({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "          ...company,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "          children: buildTree(company.id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        }))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        .sort((a, b) =\u003e a.name.localeCompare(b.name));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    return topLevel"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "      .map(company =\u003e ({"

          {

            "text": "        ...company,"

            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        children: buildTree(company.id)"

          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "      }))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "      .sort((a, b) =\u003e a.name.localeCompare(b.name));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "  }, [companies]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "  // Filter hierarchy based on search"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "  const filteredHierarchy = useMemo"

            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": ";"

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "// Get paginated parent companies (for Branch/Subsidiary selection)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "router.get('/parents', auth, async (req, res) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "  try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "    const { page = 1, limit = 20, search = '' } = req.query;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "    const offset = (parseInt(page) - 1) * parseInt(limit);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    const where = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "      [Op.and]: ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "          [Op.or]: ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "            { type: 'CORP' },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "            { type: 'SUB' }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "          ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "        },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "      ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "    if (search) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "      const searchConditions = ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "        { name: { [Op.iLike]: &#96;%${search}%&#96; } },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "        { code: { [Op.iLike]: &#96;%${search}%&#96; } }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "      ];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "      // Try to parse as number for referenceNo search"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "      const searchNum = parseInt(search);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "      if (!isNaN(searchNum)) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "        searchConditions.push({ referenceNo: searchNum });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "      where[Op.and].push({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "        [Op.or]: searchConditions"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "      });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "    const { count, rows } = await Company.findAndCountAll({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "      where,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "      attributes: ['id', 'name', 'referenceNo', 'code', 'type'],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "      limit: parseInt(limit),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "      offset: offset,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "      order: [['name', 'ASC']]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "    res.json({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "      data: rows,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "      pagination: {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "        page: parseInt(page),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "        limit: parseInt(limit),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "        total: count,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "        pages: Math.ceil(count / parseInt(limit))"

          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "  } catch (error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "    console.error('Error fetching parent companies:', error);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "    res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "});"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "// Get companies in hierarchical structure for tree view filters"
          },

            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "// Only returns companies the user has access to, structured as a tree"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "router.get"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": " * Check if a company has children (any descendants)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": " * "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": " * @param {string} companyId - UUID of the company"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": " * @returns {Promise\u003cboolean\u003e} True if company has children, false otherwise"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "async function hasChildren(companyId) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "  const company = await Company.findByPk(companyId, {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    attributes: ['id', 'left', 'right']"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "  });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "  if (!company) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    return false;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "  // Use nested set if available"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "  if (company.left !== null \u0026\u0026 company.right !== null) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "    const count = await Company.count({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "      where: {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        left: { [Op.gte]: company.left },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        right: { [Op.lte]: company.right },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "        id: { [Op.ne]: company.id }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "    return count \u003e 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "  // Fallback: check for direct children"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "  const children = await Company.count({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    where: { parentId: companyId }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "  });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "  if (children \u003e 0) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    return true;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "  // Check recursively if any descendants exist"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "  const descendants = await getDescendantCompanyIds(companyId, false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "  return descendants.length \u003e 0;"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": " * Get accessible company IDs for a user based on their assigned companies"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": " * Rules:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": " * - If company has children: user sees own company + all descendants"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": " * - If company has no children (branch): user sees only own company"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": " * "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": " * @param {string[]} assignedCompanyIds - Array of company IDs the user is assigned to"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": " * @returns {Promise\u003cstring[]\u003e} Array of all accessible company IDs"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": " */"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "// Customer associations (Parent/Child hierarchy)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "Customer.hasMany(Customer, { "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "  foreignKey: 'parentId', "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "  as: 'children',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "  onDelete: 'SET NULL'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "});"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "Customer.belongsTo(Customer, { "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "  foreignKey: 'parentId', "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "  as: 'parent',"
          }
        ],
        "range": {

            "line": 44

            "line": 32
          }

            "text": "// Create company"

          {

            "text": "    if (!name) {"

          },
          {

          },

            "text": "    // Validate comma-separated email addresses (if globalSystemEmail provided for backwards compatibility)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 684,
            "text": "    if (globalSystemEmail) {"
          },

            "lineNumber": 685,
            "text": "      const emailRegex = /^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 686,
            "text": "      const emailList = globalSystemEmail.split(',').map(e =\u003e e.trim()).filter(e =\u003e e);"

            "text": "      for (const addr of emailList) {"

            "text": "        if (!emailRegex.test(addr)) {"

          {
            "lineNumber": 689,

          },

_**Agent (default)**_


Here’s what’s in place.

### New document: `docs/Company-Hierarchy-Integration-Guide.md`

It’s aimed at **reusing the same integration in another portal** and covers:

1. **Model** – `parentId`, `type` (`CORP` / `SUB` / `BRANCH`), optional nested set `left`/`right`, and core rules.  
2. **Backend utilities** – `backend/utils/companyHierarchy.js` (`getDescendantCompanyIds`, `hasChildren`, `getAccessibleCompanyIds`).  
3. **Access control** – `backend/middleware/documentAccess.js`: assigned parent → user sees **that company + all descendants**; assigned leaf → **only that company**.  
4. **List filters** – e.g. invoices: choosing a parent `companyId` / `companyIds` **expands to descendants** so documents under branches match.  
5. **APIs** – table mapping the main `/api/companies/*` routes used for parents, hierarchy, and CRUD.  
6. **Frontend** – `HierarchicalCompanyFilter` (calls `/api/companies/hierarchy`) vs `CompanyHierarchyFilter` (tree built from a passed-in list), plus Companies / Branches / Add Branch / Add Subsidiary pages.  
7. **Porting checklist** – ordered steps to replicate in another app.

### Existing doc (still the deep reference)

You already had **`docs/Parent-Companies-and-Branches.md`** with the full domain write-up and API narrative. The new guide **links to it** and adds the cross-cutting “how it’s wired” pieces (access + filter expansion + file map) that matter when cloning the pattern elsewhere.

If you want this trimmed to a one-pager for non-developers or exported as PDF-friendly wording, say which audience and tone you prefer.
